game.name: Blackjack
game.description: A web-based implementation of the classic casino card game Blackjack (also known as 21)
game.author: Theo Lidec

game_rules.objective: Get a hand value as close to 21 as possible without exceeding it, while beating the dealer's hand

card_values.aces: 11 points (can be reduced to 1 if hand exceeds 21)

gameplay.initial_deal: Both player and dealer receive 2 cards each
gameplay.dealer_hidden_card: Dealer's second card is hidden until player's turn ends
player_actions: Stand (end turn and let dealer play)
gameplay.dealer_rules: Dealer must hit on 16 and below, stand on 17 and above

win_conditions.higher_score: Higher score than dealer without exceeding 21

data_structures.hand: Array storing cards in format [rank, suit, value, rank, suit, value, ...]
data_structures.game_state: Managed through global variables and DOM manipulation

key_functions.name: createDeck
key_functions.purpose: Creates a shuffled deck of 52 cards

key_functions.name: dealInitialCards
key_functions.purpose: Deals 2 cards each to player and dealer

key_functions.name: checkIfAbove21
key_functions.purpose: Calculates scores and checks win/lose conditions

key_functions.name: hideDealersSecondCard
key_functions.purpose: Hides the dealer's second card and score during initial deal

key_functions.name: showDealersCards
key_functions.purpose: Reveals the dealer's hidden cards and score

key_functions.name: updateCardDisplay
key_functions.purpose: Updates the DOM to display the current hand cards

key_functions.name: dealRandomCard
key_functions.purpose: Draws a random card from the deck and adds it to the hand

key_functions.name: haveAce
key_functions.purpose: Checks if the hand contains an Ace

key_functions.name: winnerPopup
key_functions.purpose: Displays a popup showing the game winner

key_functions.name: initGame
key_functions.purpose: Initializes the game and sets up restart functionality

key_functions.name: gameLoop
key_functions.purpose: Main game loop that resets hands and starts a new round

ui_components.game_container: Main wrapper div for the entire game
ui_components.game_view: Green background area containing all game elements

card_element.structure: Div with card-content containing suit and value

winner-popup.structure: Modal overlay with winner text and restart button
winner-popup.display: Initially hidden, shown after game ends
winner-popup.restart_button: Restarts the game and hides the popup

card_representation.format: Each card stored as 3 consecutive array elements: [rank, suit, value]

ace_handling.soft_17: Aces initially worth 11, reduced to 1 if total > 21
ace_handling.detection: haveAce() function checks for 'A' in hand
ace_handling.adjustment: Score calculation subtracts 10 for each ace when needed

dom_manipulation.card_display: Dynamically created div elements appended to containers
dom_manipulation.visibility_effects: Color transparency for hidden dealer card

timing.dealer_actions: 400ms delay before showing cards, 800ms between hits

known_limitations: Dealer hits on soft 17 (some casinos stand)
No deck penetration or card counting prevention
future_improvements: Add betting system with chip management
Improve winner display with visual feedback
